metadata.title: Digital Garden
metadata.description: Publish your notes to the web for others to enjoy. For free.

regex.source: Notice(`Check snapshot to make sure nothing has accidentally changed`)
regex.target: Notice(`检查快照以确保没有意外更改。`)

regex.source: Notice("Please set the garden base url in the settings")
regex.target: Notice("请在设置中设置花园的基本URL")
Notice("应用于网站的样式设置")
Notice("样式设置已从网站中移除")

regex.source: Notice(`${this.settings.faviconPath} is not a valid file.`)
regex.target: Notice(`${this.settings.faviconPath} 不是一个有效的文件。`)

regex.source: Notice("Adding publish flag to note and publishing it.")
regex.target: Notice("将发布标志添加到笔记中并将其发布。")

regex.source:
Notice(
              `Publishing ${filesToPublish.length} notes, deleting ${filesToDelete.length} notes and ${imagesToDelete.length} images. See the status bar in lower right corner for progress.`,
              8e3
            )
regex.target:
Notice(
              `发布 ${filesToPublish.length} 条笔记，删除 ${filesToDelete.length} 条笔记和 ${imagesToDelete.length} 张图片。查看右下角状态栏以了解进度。`,
              8e3
            )
Notice(`笔记链接已复制到剪贴板`)

regex.source: Notice(`Successfully published note to your garden.`)
regex.target: Notice(`成功将笔记发布到您的园地。`)

regex.source: Notice("Unable to publish note, something went wrong.")
regex.target: Notice("无法发布笔记，出现了问题。")
.log("初始化数字花园插件 v" + this.appVersion)
.error("无法获取最新版本发布信息。")
.error("无法加载生成花园快照", e)
text: `已标记 ${this.numberOfNotesToPublish} 个文件以发布`

regex.source: text: "Remember to read the setup guide if you haven't already. It can be found "
regex.target: text: "如果您尚未阅读安装指南，请记得阅读。您可以在以下位置找到它。"
text: "笔记设置文档已经可用"

regex.source: .setName("Show a table of content for notes (dg-show-toc)")

regex.target: .setName("将当前的样式设置应用到网站。")
.setName("在内部链接上显示笔记图标")
.setName("在反向链接上显示笔记图标")

regex.source: .setDesc("When turned on, a filetree will be shown on your site.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在打开时，将在您的站点上显示一个文件树。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Manage themes, sitename and styling on your site")
regex.target: .setDesc("管理您的网站主题、站点名称和样式。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Key to get the note icon value from the frontmatter")
regex.target: .setDesc("从前置数据中获取笔记图标值的关键")

regex.source: .setDesc("The default value for note icon if not specified")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果未指定，笔记图标的默认值。")

regex.source:
.setDesc(
        `
				This will create a pull request with the latest template changes, which you'll need to use all plugin features. 
				It will not publish any changes before you approve them.
			`
      )
regex.target:
.setDesc(
        `
				这将创建一个包含最新模板更改的拉取请求，您需要使用所有插件功能。在您批准之前，它不会发布任何更改。
			`
      )

regex.source: span.innerText = "A GitHub token with repo permissions. You can generate it ";
regex.target: span.innerText = "一个拥有仓库权限的GitHub令牌。你可以在这里生成它。 ";

regex.source: div0.textContent = "Define rules to rewrite note paths/folder structure, using following\n		syntax:";
regex.target: div0.textContent = "定义规则来重写笔记路径/文件夹结构，使用以下语法：";

regex.source: div1.textContent = 'Example: If you want the vault folder "Personal/Journal" to be shown as\n		only "Journal" in the left file sidebar in the garden, add the line\n		"Personal/Journal:Journal"';
regex.target: div1.textContent = '示例：如果你想在左侧文件边栏中仅显示“个人/日记”文件夹为“日记”，添加一行\n		"个人/日记:日记"';

regex.source: div2.textContent = "To define a folder as the root folder for the garden, use\n		`[from_vault_path]:`";
regex.target: div2.textContent = "要将一个文件夹定义为花园的根文件夹，请使用\n		`[from_vault_path]:`";

regex.source: div3.textContent = "Saving will not update the garden directly, and changes will be visible\n		in the publication center.";
regex.target: div3.textContent = "保存不会直接更新花园，更改将在发布中心可见。";

regex.source: t = text("No notes will be affected by the change");
regex.target: t = text("更改不会影响任何笔记");

regex.source:
ol.innerHTML = `
  • One rule-per line
  • The format is [from_vault_path]:[to_garden_path]
  • Matching will exit on first match
    • `;
regex.target:
ol.innerHTML = `
  • 每行一条规则
  • 格式为[from_vault_path]:[to_garden_path]
    • from_vault_path 是原始的笔记路径或文件夹名称。
    • to_garden_path 是重写后的目标路径或文件夹名称。
  • 匹配会在找到第一条匹配规则时停止，不会继续查找后续规则。
    • `;

regex.source: .innerHTML = `Define regex filters to replace note content before publishing.`;
regex.target: .innerHTML = `定义正则表达式筛选器，在发布前替换笔记内容。`;
.innerHTML = `格式：[正则表达式模式, 替换内容, 正则表达式标志];`

regex.source: .innerHTML = `Example: filter [:smile:, \u{1F600}, g] will replace text with real emojis`;
regex.target: .innerHTML = `示例：筛选器 [:smile:, \u{1F600}, g] 将把文本替换为真实的表情符号`;
